summary: Email Integration Testing Complete - All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Resend.com email integration is working correctly for: 1) Welcome emails on registration, 2) Password reset emails, 3) Reset password page UI. Payment invoice email endpoint exists but requires real Epoint callback to trigger.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Welcome email sent on registration - verified in logs with Resend ID
✅ Password reset email sent via /api/auth/forgot-password - verified in logs
✅ Reset password page shows form when token provided, error when no token
✅ Reset password validation works (password mismatch, invalid token)
✅ Payment invoice email code exists in /api/payments/callback (lines 2749-2763)
✅ Email templates render correctly with Azerbaijani text
✅ Resend API key is configured and working (RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Reset password page, Forgot password page, Registration flow all working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (test_welcome_*, test_reset_*, test_ui_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email integration is fully working. Resend.com API is configured with valid API key. Welcome emails sent on registration, password reset emails sent via forgot-password endpoint. Payment invoice emails are triggered by Epoint callback (requires real payment to test). All email templates use Azerbaijani text.
